<tr class="container">
    <td id="Card9918533" class="OneColLarge">
        <table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0px 5px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);" width="600">
            <tr>
                <td>
                    <a id="Href9918533" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAC6Y345SLFMEFCCRZFO4JDYBETITIV6IJASNOQ245OFMLTMDVXOGJIWPAUAEOVEFZLF7Q4V3JK527DPRIAVMRCKRSZEVTO4SFVUNSKKSMT4F6ZS5COYJ5NR64HRK73S5BWE6U7PBQ3MKTH6LDPJO24NY6FFCZI4MNS4UH2NWX7F3C7JG4I5MZ&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">

            <tr>
                <td id="Title9918533" width="560" align="left" style="padding: 20px 20px 8px 20px; font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size:28px; line-height:1.2;color:#333333;font-weight:normal;text-decoration:none;">

                        With Trump's 14th Amendment case, law and 2024 election poised to collide at SCOTUS
                    </a>

            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td id="Summary9918533" align="left" style="padding: 0px 20px 11px 20px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 18px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.3;">
                    <a id="Href9918533" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADREXXRD5KISBA5SXV3P47BZHBR3BLVKSH2CRZESSPVOU2XPJTVPXI54KSWD6QRZ7HTOPY64URVNSW4XHHUA4B4R2DRVWAEGLWOYU5AMXL5LKXR2WS44RIK6RL3EZAP34R3GVCVCAMJ4USCR23DBOEJ3PXJ6JZHLBZMCYKCYLPQ6VIS6CTG4I&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">
                            The Supreme Court is likely to take on a case from Colorado that deals with Trump's eligibility to run for president in 2024,…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td height="25" align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 0px 20px 15px 37px;">
                        <tr>
                            <td id="ProviderName9918533" height="28" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 18px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.2; border: none;color:#666666;">

<td id="Card9918535" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href9918535" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADS3JKY2MHXCAKZG273D6XHWWYPUZXNN3CUX4AHZMKWRPE5CRR3UVLEEFGODL6EFMRKOMVXSQ2ZFBXQ2RUEEMKKSEPKNUVL4LDNULSPVNWQH7YW3AHJTUJMB4OSYCED45VHT5XOMXG4OC3AYAZGRK64J2XWWVEFH3ZP7WDIEQOEGUWIZMNA7H&" target="_blank">

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title9918535" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href9918535" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACSKWOALX357F2PSDBHUVU2SNHWW77W2CS2L4RJLSF3DM3NAO53XCCL7YPZZCBY7ZSZPW3IJAZPHEVHWNQAQ2X6P7CNI6TWUPLOWWMXNOV6K7U5O7GLAIBVVWNFYAY5VD6N2DI73JU2BJX3DHNLMCKZ3KZY37H7UKQO2JVM5HTFMLTOOADQOE&" target="_blank">

                    </a>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">

<tr>
    <td height="12"></td>
</tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td align="center" width="100%">
                            <table style="padding: 0; margin: 0;  max-width: 600px; max-height: 300px; vertical-align:middle;" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
                                <tr>
                                    
<td id="Card9918536" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href9918536" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACAIB7OVXLFUHENL7Y6OL6MEWGOGTELO4O2OHW6QTDEMCC7K7MPSVD2IDIYQUGAXCTQLQW6L6SJKGMSDN6I7ATYND4YPBYIYIXEGPNBDIAJ2JCQRLLF4UPN5ZC2J5DLPTO5MLCMQTWWPTLQJK332YLOKGDHDTPMNBLYYX6UPXOZTZSADRF7M4I62HNL2NZRMWPAE45LT3DFEIYIDUR2OQSWDEY3KGHO6UMCPNTNXTSY7GXLJENPIIEYFLE3JXHMXBOOWSUT4GPPCHKJCTWB5GKRPQ67Y&d=AIAADK4ACSZBRM67LOF64F2AFFRS4N3HG2RJKV6GSV3AXVZWKKV5MUR3FCPTWQXQF2XK77HU4BC75IX5EXNLTJ7S7XOCQMZELI7NTOYTGHHX7MBDXDHOT3TOVM6FQWLM2RQN2G6YOW6WZLKFZDDA2TDBBTAXPRWH6ZNBVXS6PNX3UQDASVBKM32H&" target="_blank">
                        <img id="Img9918536" width="295" height="160" style="border: none; display: block; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0px;" src="https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.1c22f0bb1639bb6418759f73ff57097c&pid=Wdp&w=295&h=160&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2">
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title9918536" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href9918536" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACLS6TC7MRA3Z2TXYBI7XECICBNLKMHIBS27WGA6HLTZV6UWNDHMSE6GOF7QPTODA6Z3KZGBONNV2PMNB24GPXJG3WUQNB4HMODSG6GXBROHBBBVZDN35WXGY6J7VC3TTONG3MTNTETRP6UTRYLEHKTK5N5FBKY37DHMMBLWJAYBIT7MBMGEFURTVHWWSAY7OYQEK6YEE3O6QPNX2FVF6WQ3OIJML5TFES6JU6JVXRYGZFBQTWWEP2MNR4PSARDKXYPWIXEQWHY6MO47P6UGO7EMNAIQ&d=AIAADKQR55HS36RW5TKLN77HIVGUUQEQWKTBKKH6ZJ3M56IT2VVEYH3F2SNXHORU52YVMCXECPAJDLZPNU6CTV2JSKNPORHY4DGMQSGX67FDJOCYLBCKJBROAFIYGKJWR5PXW2Q34GTWRAF22MQXERRXWLHPWGHZ32ZOMT4VVMFYKVB7DVHEKCMQ&" target="_blank">
                        U.S. Troops Warned of Imminent Attack
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td id="ProviderName9918536" height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">

</td>

                                    <td style="padding:4px;margin:0px;width:0px; background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;</td>
                                    
<td id="Card9918537" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title9918537" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
